subject: FW: An invitation for Mr. Epstein from Jeffrey Leeds and Leeds Equity Partners - private viewing of the Magna Carta
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Brigid McCarthy [mailto:brigid.mccarthy@leedsequity.com] 
Sent: Friday, December 07, 2007 4:46 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: An invitation for Mr. Epstein from Jeffrey Leeds and Leeds
Equity Partners - private viewing of the Magna Carta



Please join us for a private viewing of the Magna Carta at Sotheby's on
Monday evening, December 17th, from 6-8pm. 

  

As you may know, a 1296 Magna Carta will be auctioned at Sotheby's the
next night with estimates valuing it in the $20-30 million range.  It is
the only copy in the United States and the only copy in private hands --
the 16 other copies are owned by the British or Australian governments,
or by ecclesiastical or educational institutions in England.   Until
several weeks ago, this copy was on display in the National Archives in
Washington, steps from the Declaration of Independence and the
Constitution. 

  

Leeds Equity is honored to invite close friends and associates of our
Firm to see this manuscript in an intimate setting.  I truly hope that
you can join us. 

  

A formal invitation is attached.  Please let us know if you can attend
so that we can make arrangements. 

     

Best regards. 

  

Sincerely, 

  

Jeffrey T. Leeds 

 

 

Brigid McCarthy

Leeds Equity Partners, LLC

350 Park Avenue, 23rd Floor

New York, NY  10022

212-835-2004 

212-835-2020 (fax)

 

The information contained in this email is confidential, may be
privileged, may constitute inside information and is intended only for
the use of the intended.  Leeds Equity Partners, LLC does not provide
legal, accounting or tax advice.  Any statement in this email (including
any attachments) regarding legal, accounting or tax matters was written
in connection with the explanation of the matters described herein and
was not intended or written to be relied upon by any person.
Unauthorized dissemination, distribution, disclosure or other use of the
contents of this email is strictly prohibited and may be unlawful.  If
you have received this email in error, please notify us immediately by
return or by calling (212) 835-2000 and destroy this message and all
copies thereof, including any attachments.

Sent: Friday, December 07, 2007 4:46 PM

Subject: An invitation for Mr. Epstein from Jeffrey Leeds and Leeds Equity Partners - private viewing of the Magna Carta

Please join us for a private viewing of the Magna Carta at Sotheby's on Monday evening, December 17th, from 6-8pm.

 

As you may know, a 1296 Magna Carta will be auctioned at Sotheby's the next night with estimates valuing it in the $20-30 million range.  It is the only copy in the United States and the only copy in private hands -- the 16 other copies are owned by the British or Australian governments, or by ecclesiastical or educational institutions in England.   Until several weeks ago, this copy was on display in the National Archives in Washington, steps from the Declaration of Independence and the Constitution.

 

Leeds Equity is honored to invite close friends and associates of our Firm to see this manuscript in an intimate setting.  I truly hope that you can join us.

 

A formal invitation is attached.  Please let us know if you can attend so that we can make arrangements.

Jeffrey T. Leeds
